name: RAGU: A Multi-Step GraphRAG Engine with a Compact Domain-Adapted LLM
summary: arXiv:2607.11683v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Graph retrieval-augmented generation (GraphRAG) enhances large language models with structured knowledge, yet existing systems construct knowledge...
description: arXiv:2607.11683v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Graph retrieval-augmented generation (GraphRAG) enhances large language models with structured knowledge, yet existing systems construct knowledge graphs in a single extraction pass, producing noisy entities and brittle retrieval. RAGU, an open-source modular GraphRAG engine, addresses this by separating extraction from consolidation: entities a...
author: Mikhail Komarov, Ivan Bondarenko, Stanislav Shtuka, Oleg Sedukhin, Roman Shuvalov, Yana Dementyeva, Matvey Solovyov, Nikolay O. Nikitin
